$comment: Type-check the L4 eval harness (evals/harness, evals/scenarios, evals/cli.ts). The main tsconfig.json scopes to src/ + rootDir:src for the production build; this one widens the rootDir to the repo root so evals can import src/ types when needed. evals/sample-app-variants/ is browser code (uses DOM globals, MessageEvent, self) — each variant gets its own materialized tsconfig with DOM+WebWorker lib via scripts/build-variants.mjs, so it's excluded from this repo-level pass.
